test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_{partitions} (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY a PARTITION BY sipHash64(a) % {partitions}
CREATE TABLE t_skew_10000000_{partitions} (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple() PARTITION BY a
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_{partitions} SELECT number, number FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
INSERT INTO t_skew_10000000_{partitions} SELECT if(number % 10 < 9, number % 3, 3 + (number % 27)) AS a, number AS b FROM numbers_mt(10000000)
test.query: SELECT DISTINCT a FROM test_{partitions} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM test_{partitions} WHERE b > 1 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT a, b FROM test_{partitions} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM test_{partitions} SETTINGS optimize_distinct_in_order = 1 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM t_skew_10000000_{partitions} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM test_{partitions} ARRAY JOIN range(a % 4) AS e FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT a, b FROM test_{partitions} LIMIT 1 BY a FORMAT Null
SELECT a, count() FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a, b FROM test_{partitions}) GROUP BY a FORMAT Null SETTINGS allow_aggregate_partitions_independently = 1
SELECT DISTINCT a FROM (SELECT a FROM test_{partitions} LIMIT 5 BY a) FORMAT Null
SELECT a, count() FROM (SELECT a FROM test_{partitions} LIMIT 5 BY a) GROUP BY a FORMAT Null SETTINGS allow_aggregate_partitions_independently = 1
